title: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
"Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire"

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

options.title: Read the Back
options.requires: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.requires: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.requires: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

notes:
This event presents the player with a choice to Enchant one of three card types from their deck. Each option is locked if the player lacks that card type:

- [gold]Read the Back[/gold]: Requires at least one Attack card to Enchant with Sharp (+2)
- [gold]Read a Random Passage[/gold]: Requires at least one Skill card to Enchant with Nimble (+2)
- [gold]Read the Entire Book[/gold]: Requires at least one Power card to Enchant with Swift (+2)

If the player has no enchantable cards of any type, they can only Move On (skip the event). Otherwise, locked options are presented grayed out with their lock condition text displayed.
